text: Employee Handbook Company SmartTech Solutions Pvt. Ltd. Version: 2026 Effective Date: July 1, 2026 Welcome Welcome to SmartTech Solutions Pvt. Ltd. This handbook outlines company policies, procedures, and employee benefits. Company Vision To become a global leader in AI-powered enterprise solutions. Working Hours Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM. Lunch: 1:00 PM – 2:00 PM. Attendance Policy Late arrivals exceeding 15 minutes more than three times a month may result in disciplinary action. Leave Policy Casual Leave: 12 days/year Sick Leave: 12 days/year Earned Leave: 15 days/year Maternity Leave: 180 days Paternity Leave: 15 days Work From Home Employees may work remotely up to 2 days per week with manager approval. Code of Conduct Respect colleagues, maintain professionalism, protect confidential information, and follow company ethics. IT Security Use strong passwords, enable MFA, never share credentials, and report suspicious emails. Employee Benefits Health Insurance, Annual Bonus, Provident Fund, Paid Training Programs, Free Certification Courses. Emergency Contact HR Email: hr@smarttech.com Phone: +91-9876543210 FAQs Q: How many casual leaves? A: 12/year. Q: WFH? A: Up to 2 days/week with approval. Q: Office timings? A: 9 AM–6 PM.
